name: SysGroup plc
summary: SysGroup plc, together with its subsidiaries, provides managed IT, cloud hosting, and IT consultancy services in the United Kingdom and internationally. It operates through two segments, Managed IT Services and Value Added Resale. It offers managed, cloud hosting and security, and disaster recovery services, as well as professional and consultancy services; and hardware and software licenses. The company serves customers under the Netplan, System Professional, and Rockford brand names. The company was formerly known as Daily Internet PLC and changed its name to SysGroup plc in July 2016. SysGroup plc was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Liverpool, the United Kingdom.
